claim_limit: No 40-block search or global exclusion was attempted. C(12,6,4) remains open in the maintained range 40..41.
established: The designated current page reports 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41 and its 41 blocks cover all 495 four-subsets.
A hypothetical 40-block cover has all point degrees 20 and pair multiplicities 9 except for a unique perfect matching of six multiplicity-10 pairs.
There are exactly 10,395 possible perfect matchings; relabeling fixes one matching, leaving a stabilizer of order 46,080.
Relative to the fixed matching the 924 blocks split by complete-pair count r as 64, 480, 360, 20; every feasible 40-block r-profile has an r=0 block or, if none, an r=1 block.

baseline_experiment.negative_control: Deleting the first published block leaves 485/495 targets covered, so the control correctly fails.

scoped_internal_state.direct_depth7_sample: 10/128 provisional closures; no retained/replayed proofs in that sample, so no exclusions promoted
scoped_internal_state.link_campaign: four catalogued link orbits with residual exclusions; 189 recorded replay receipts; 47 canonical frontier nodes still open
stopped_unchanged_routes: deeper fourth-layer first-child branching without a representative matched sample
Glucose4 incremental reuse under the prior best-effort wrapper/caps

tooling_gate.missing: No DRAT-trim binary/source is present in this problem checkout, although a replay wrapper and historical receipts exist.
tooling_gate.required_before_frontier: Restore a pinned project-scoped proof checker from the official source and replay a small known UNSAT control plus one existing leaf receipt. Fail closed on any hash or verdict mismatch.

next_route.proposal: After the tooling gate, compare kmtotalizer against the existing sequential counter on 20 deterministically selected open link-frontier leaves, cold CaDiCaL 1.7.3 at 10 seconds each.
controls: same primary-variable order and identical non-cardinality clauses
separate structural totalizer auditor rather than PySAT-shared checking
hash-bound catalog-4 blocker rebuilt and audited
UNSAT counts only after proof replay; SAT goes to direct link/orbit/residual checks
published 41-block witness remains the positive end-to-end control
next_route.success_signal: At least 8/20 replayed closures, no semantic disagreement, and projected proof storage below 30 GB.
next_route.stop_signal: Fewer than 8/20 replayed closures, any audit mismatch, or excessive proof growth; do not deepen or raise timeouts unchanged.

lab_review.reason: Segment 1 passed its exact 41-cover check, checkpoint, throughput, correctness, and artifact-growth thresholds; segment 2 is the predeclared final lifecycle control.
lab_review.scope: orchestration validation only, not mathematical progress toward excluding 40
